suite.name: Arguments

test.name: Validate the unsuccessful login shows error message

kw.name: Check the user is able to see the login page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Fill the username and password fields with valid credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait until the error message is displayed for the invalid credentials
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Validate the error message is correct
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Validate the cards displayed on the shopping page

kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait for the shop page to load
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Check the user is able to see the login page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: List of the card titles to be displayed
Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Test the card titles are displayed after logging in to portal

test.name: Validate unsuccessful login shows an error message

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password

kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test verifies that invalid login shows an error message.
